chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-1452 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 27.10.2025 Syed Shoa-un-Nabi, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Saima Imdad, Assistant Advocate General Malik Altaf Hussain, advocate for the KMC PI Kamran --------- The main grievance of the petitioner is that he has not been paid salary and arrears since 2005. He has also not been regularized. The petitioner shall file an application / representation in respect of the same within days of the date of this order to the Municipal Commissioner, KMC, who shall within days of the receipt of such application/representation, forward the same to the relevant department, which shall make a decision on merit after hearing the petitioner through a speaking order within months of the date of this order. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Municipal Commissioner, KMC, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
